title: Mayil Pola Ponnu Onnu Lyrics Bharathi
stanzas:
Mayil pola ponnu onnu
kili pola pechu onnu(2)

Mayil pola ponnu onnu
kili pola pechu onnu
kuyil pola paattu onnu
kaettu ninnu
manasu pona idam
theriyala
andha mayakkam
enaku innum theliyala.

sakkaramaa emmanasu
suththuthadi
mandhaara malli
marikozhundhu sembagame
una muriyaa poove
ena murichathaenadiyo

thanga mugam paarkka
dhinam sooriyanum
varalaam.
sangu kaluthukke
pirai chandhirana
tharalaam

kuyil pola paattu onnu
kaettu ninnu
manasu pona idam
theriyala
andha mayakkam
enaku innum theliyala.

kuththu vilakoliye
siru kutti nila oliye
muthu sudar oliye
oru mutham nee tharuvayaa

kuyil pola paattu onnu
kaettu ninnu
manasu pona idam
theriyala
andha mayakkam
enaku innum theliyala.

Mayil pola ponnu onnu
kili pola pechu onnu(2)

kuyil pola paattu onnu
kaettu ninnu
manasu pona idam
theriyala
andha mayakkam
enaku innum theliyala.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, using metaphors related to nature.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Bhavatharini.

What year was this song released?

This song was released in 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayil Pola Ponnu, the lyrics evoke a deep sense of nostalgia and romance, painting a vivid picture of love's complexities. The song's soothing melody, combined with Bhavatharini's enchanting voice, creates an atmosphere of longing and beauty. It resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love. This classic piece stands out for its poetic depth and emotional resonance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayil Pola Ponnu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Bharathi as its backdrop, this song beautifully intertwines the poetic lyrics with Bhavatharini's soulful voice. Experience the nostalgia and romance that this classic brings to life, making it a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: Like a peacock, a girl speaks like a parrot.
Like a peacock, a girl speaks like a parrot. I don't know where my heart has gone after hearing a song like a cuckoo's. That confusion is still unclear to me.
Like a peacock, a girl, a girl.
My heart is sweet like sugar, blooming like a mandhara flower, and I wonder if you are the flower that has bloomed in my heart.
Every day, I look at your golden face, and the sun may not rise. The moon may shine like a conch shell.
Like a cuckoo, I don't know where my heart has gone after hearing a song. That confusion is still unclear to me.
Like a peacock, a girl, a girl.
In the silver moon, like a cloud, who has come with the jasmine flower?
In a small breeze, I have written your name.
What is this breeze that has come and disturbed me?
Like a lamp, little moonlight, pearl-like light, will you give me a kiss?
Like a cuckoo, I don't know where my heart has gone after hearing a song. That confusion is still unclear to me.
Like a peacock, a girl speaks like a parrot.
Like a cuckoo, I don't know where my heart has gone after hearing a song. That confusion is still unclear to me.
Like a peacock, a girl, a girl.
